name: State of Britain Data API
description: Open datasets on Britain's public services, economy, and society. All sourced from official UK government statistics.
attribution: Contains public sector information licensed under the Open Government Licence v3.0. OECD data is an adaptation of original OECD works and should not be reported as representing the official views of the OECD or its member countries. HESA data licensed under CC BY 4.0.

datasets.name: Public Spending
datasets.description: Total managed expenditure, receipts, borrowing, debt interest, debt/GDP, and departmental breakdown. Includes OBR forecasts.
datasets.source: OBR Public Finances Databank Feb 2026, HM Treasury PESA 2025

datasets.name: NHS Waiting Times & A&E
datasets.description: Referral-to-treatment waiting times (median, % within 18 weeks, 52-week breaches), A&E attendances and emergency admissions.
datasets.source: NHS England RTT Waiting Times, NHS England A&E Statistics

datasets.name: Health Outcomes
datasets.description: Life expectancy at birth by sex, cancer survival rates by type, avoidable mortality trends.
datasets.source: ONS National Life Tables, ONS Cancer Survival, ONS Avoidable Mortality

datasets.name: Primary Care / GP Access
datasets.description: GP appointment volumes by type (face-to-face, telephone, online), GP workforce headcount, patients per GP.
datasets.source: NHS Digital Appointments in General Practice, NHS Digital GP Workforce

datasets.name: Consumer Prices (CPIH)
datasets.description: Consumer Prices Index including owner occupiers' housing costs, with sector breakdown (food, housing, transport, recreation).
datasets.source: ONS CPIH (cpih01 v67)

datasets.name: Energy Mix
datasets.description: UK primary energy composition by fuel type: coal, petroleum, gas, nuclear, renewables, bioenergy, imports.
datasets.source: DESNZ Digest of UK Energy Statistics (DUKES) 2025

datasets.name: Water Company Performance
datasets.description: Sewer collapses, water quality, internal flooding, storm overflows, pollution incidents, customer complaints.
datasets.source: Ofwat Performance Report 2024–25, Environment Agency, EDM storm overflow returns

datasets.name: Emissions & Air Quality
datasets.description: GHG emissions by sector (MtCO2e), PM2.5, NO2, vehicle licensing and EV uptake.
datasets.source: DESNZ GHG Emissions Statistics 2024, DEFRA Air Quality, DfT Vehicle Licensing

datasets.name: Family & Fertility
datasets.description: Total fertility rate by birth order, births, household composition, family formation trends.
datasets.source: ONS Births in England & Wales 2024, ONS Families & Households, ONS Fertility Rates by Parity

datasets.name: Business Demography
datasets.description: Business births, deaths, active firms, survival rates, and high-growth firms. Equity funding data excluded from API (British Business Bank licence).
datasets.source: ONS Business Demography UK 2024

datasets.name: R&D Spending
datasets.description: Gross domestic expenditure on R&D by sector (government, UKRI, higher education, business, overseas).
datasets.source: ONS UK GERD 2023, World Bank, OECD MSTI

datasets.name: Productivity
datasets.description: Output per hour worked (index and £/hour), sector breakdown, OECD international comparison.
datasets.source: ONS Output per Hour Worked UK, OECD Productivity Database

datasets.name: Business Investment
datasets.description: UK gross fixed capital formation in current prices and chained volume measure, with OECD comparison.
datasets.source: ONS Business Investment Q4 2024, OECD National Accounts

datasets.name: Infrastructure
datasets.description: Broadband (FTTP rollout), rail (performance, journeys, track km), roads (traffic, length, condition, potholes).
datasets.source: Ofcom Connected Nations, ORR Data Portal, DfT Road Traffic & Road Length

datasets.name: Industrial Production
datasets.description: Production volumes by category (chemicals, textiles, vehicles, minerals, etc.). Steel data excluded from API (World Steel Association licence).
datasets.source: BGS, ONS PRODCOM, DESNZ, industry associations

datasets.name: Education
datasets.description: Per-pupil spending, GCSE/A-level attainment, PISA scores, HE participation, teacher metrics.
datasets.source: DfE, ONS, OECD PISA

datasets.name: Justice & Policing
datasets.description: Recorded crime vs CSEW survey, police numbers, prison population/capacity, court backlog, charging rates.
datasets.source: ONS Crime Survey, HMIC, HM Courts & Tribunals

datasets.name: Defence
datasets.description: UK defence spending (% GDP), armed forces personnel, equipment plan, reserve strength. NATO international comparison excluded from API.
datasets.source: MOD Annual Report & Accounts, MOD Personnel Statistics

datasets.name: Immigration & Demographics
datasets.description: Net migration flows, asylum applications, foreign-born population, dependency ratio, population projections.
datasets.source: ONS Migration Statistics, Home Office

datasets.name: Public Sector Workforce
datasets.description: Workforce by area (NHS, schools, police, universities) with frontline vs back-office split.
datasets.source: NHS Digital, DfE School Workforce Census, Home Office, HESA Staff Statistics

datasets.name: NHS Funding
datasets.description: Total NHS budget, per capita spending, international comparison, spending by category and budget split.
datasets.source: HM Treasury PESA, The King's Fund

datasets.name: NHS Workforce
datasets.description: NHS staff numbers by group, vacancy rates, and sickness absence.
datasets.source: NHS Digital Workforce Statistics, NHS Digital Vacancy Statistics

datasets.name: Hospital Capacity
datasets.description: Hospital bed numbers, occupancy rates, international comparison, and admission volumes.
datasets.source: NHS England KH03, OECD Health Statistics

datasets.name: Mental Health
datasets.description: Prevalence of mental disorders, talking therapies referrals, MHA detentions, children and young people referrals, suicide rates.
datasets.source: Adult Psychiatric Morbidity Survey, NHS Talking Therapies

datasets.name: Personal Safety
datasets.description: Violent crime trends, knife crime, firearms crime, homicide rates, and hospital admissions from violence.
datasets.source: ONS Crime in England and Wales, Home Office

datasets.name: Housing Stock
datasets.description: Dwelling stock by age, type, tenure trends, and EPC ratings.
datasets.source: English Housing Survey, DLUHC Tenure Trends

datasets.name: Housebuilding
datasets.description: Net additional dwellings, completions by tenure, new build size, and international comparison.
datasets.source: DLUHC Live Tables

datasets.name: Housing Density
datasets.description: UK city population density, international city density comparison, and regional house prices.
datasets.source: ONS Mid-Year Population Estimates, Demographia

datasets.name: Reservoirs
datasets.description: UK reservoir construction by decade, cumulative storage capacity, largest reservoirs, and planned/projected capacity.
datasets.source: UKCEH Inventory of Reservoirs, ONS Population Estimates

datasets.name: Children's Social Care
datasets.description: Children looked after, foster carer numbers and recruitment, social worker workforce, referrals and child protection.
datasets.source: DfE Children Looked After in England, Ofsted Fostering

datasets.name: Adult Social Care
datasets.description: Requests for support, long-term care recipients, spending, workforce numbers, and pay levels.
datasets.source: NHS England SALT/CLD, DLUHC Local Authority Revenue Expenditure

datasets.name: Jobs & Employment
datasets.description: Employment, unemployment, and inactivity trends, employment by sector and occupation, earnings by occupation.
datasets.source: ONS Labour Force Survey, ONS BRES

datasets.name: Borrowing & Debt
datasets.description: Gilt yields, monthly and annual borrowing, debt interest payments, and debt-to-GDP ratio.
datasets.source: Bank of England, ONS Public Sector Finances, OBR

datasets.name: Taxation
datasets.description: Tax receipts by type, tax burden as share of GDP, international comparison, and tax gap analysis.
datasets.source: HMRC Tax Receipts, OBR, HMRC Measuring Tax Gaps 2025

datasets.name: Money Supply
datasets.description: M4 money supply to GDP, Bank of England asset purchases (QE), cash flows, CPI rate, and real wages.
datasets.source: Bank of England M4 Statistics, Bank of England APF

datasets.name: Local Government
datasets.description: Local authority service spending, funding sources, council tax levels by region, and Section 114 notices.
datasets.source: DLUHC Local Authority Revenue Expenditure, DLUHC Council Tax Levels

datasets.name: Local Authority Spending by Council Area
datasets.description: Per-authority net current expenditure for 218 upper-tier local authorities across England, Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland. Breakdown by 12 service areas including education, social care, transport, housing.
datasets.source: MHCLG Revenue Outturn, Scottish Government LGFS, StatsWales, NI Audit Office

datasets.name: Mayoral & Combined Authority Spending
datasets.description: Per-authority net current expenditure and revenue sources for 12 combined/mayoral authorities and the Greater London Authority. Includes service breakdown (police, transport, fire) and funding sources (grants, council tax, levies, earned income).
datasets.source: MHCLG Revenue Outturn
